name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Two Missouri Police Officers Shot Last Night
body:
Peter,
Two police officers in our state were shot yesterday. In Gladstone and in St. Louis, two families, and two departments, spent the night in worry and fear. These officers left their homes and stepped into the dark to protect us.
In the face of this violence, we must take action. We must stand up for those who stand guard for us. In the year ahead, my administration will push for the strictest possible punishments for anyone who assaults a police officer.
My administration will also work with the legislature to establish a "Blue Alert" system, similar to Amber and Silver Alerts, that would send out emergency notices to speed up the capture of anyone who shoots a police officer. Twenty-seven other states have such a system in place, and it is time Missouri do the same.
Today, Sheena and I ask that Missourians pause to remember the men and women who keep us safe. If you see an officer, thank them for the work they do and the risks they take. Consider donating or volunteering your time to a charity that supports police. Go for a ride-along and see what police officers see every single day. Above all, keep the two officers in Gladstone and St. Louis and their families in your hearts, thoughts, and prayers.
To those in law enforcement: We have your backs, and we're going to fight for you. Always.

Yours in Service,
Eric Greitens

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/about?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=eb0003f249) [unsubscribe from this list](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=eb0003f249) [update subscription preferences](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/profile?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6)
Greitens for Missouri * 4579 Laclede Ave * 138 * St Louis, MO 63108 * USA

---

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: RE: A note for Hillary
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec6339/2376504694/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all")
---

Peter,

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss the chance to send Hillary a personal note and tell her why you're grateful that she ran.

We'll be delivering them to her soon, so today's your last chance to make sure your note is included.

**Add your name, and a short note if you'd like, to thank Hillary:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Thank-You-Hillary](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec633a/2376504694/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161110_email_HillaryTY?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgThankYouHillary&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

_\--------- Original Message ----------
From: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
Sent: Tues, Nov 15, 2016 at 9:36 p.m._

Peter,

As we all continue to process last week's loss, I wanted to share a few thoughts with you.

At EMILY's List we always say that the bravest thing our candidates do is put their name on the ballot. Hillary Clinton put her name on the ballot -- right at the very top.

She ran a campaign inspired by love, kindness, and community; one that valued and uplifted diverse perspectives from across the country. That's something we can all be proud of, regardless of the outcome.

Hillary may not be our first woman president, but I can guarantee you that she inspired the woman who will be first -- and when she runs, her path will be that much easier.

The EMILY's List community is sending a card to Hillary thanking her for all she did in this election.

**Join me in adding your name (and a short note if you'd like) to tell her why you're grateful that she ran:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Thank-You-Hillary](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec633b/2376504694/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161110_email_HillaryTY?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgThankYouHillary&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all")**

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec6334/2376504694/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec6335/2376504694/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec6336/2376504694/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c767f/24c69fd9/4d4e977/18ec6337/2376504694/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all&source=WPENEW31N_digital_email_20161121_HillaryTYkick_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DSCC)
subject: Trump REJECTED (timely)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Bad news: Trump's cabinet picks to carry out his dangerous agenda are WORSE than we thought! [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee50/2b07114c/4310cc2e/7371fee5/3446102151/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")
---
_**FORMER KLAN LEADER APPLAUDS TRUMP CABINET**_
[**Reject hate in the White House NOW! Sign the petition >> **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee50/2b07114c/4310cc2e/7371fee5/3446102151/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")
Friend -- Donald Trump's administration hasn't even started yet and it's shaping up to be the most divisive cabinet in history. **Just look at his picks so far:**

* CHIEF STRATEGIST Steve Bannon -- **a bigot heralded by white supremacists, the American Nazi party, and the KKK**
* ATTORNEY GENERAL Jeff Sessions -- **whose appalling civil rights record once deemed him unfit for a federal judgeship ... 30 YEARS ago!**
* NATIONAL SECURITY ADVISER Michael Flynn -- **an alt-right xenophobe who 's said "Fear of Muslims is RATIONAL"**

[**We CANNOT let these extremists run our country, Friend! Sign our petition NOW to reject hate in the White House >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee50/2b07114c/4310cc2e/7371fee5/3446102151/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Call Trump Out** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee50/2b07114c/4310cc2e/7371fee5/3446102151/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

We need to draw the line IMMEDIATELY and make our voices heard before Trump takes office. **Fighting back now is the ONLY way to prevent dangerous right-wingers like these from taking positions of power!**

[**Will you step up, Friend? ADD YOUR NAME NOW to reject Trump 's cabinet appointments >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee50/2b07114c/4310cc2e/7371fee5/3446102151/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-week1?source=PT-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV")

Thanks,
Team DSCC

A quick note on donations, Friend:

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

**[Contribute](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-week1?refcode=DPE-20161121-AddYourNameDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: Mike Swetz
subject: Do you have your ticket yet?
body:
| |
---
---
| Friend,
New Hampshire Republicans have a lot to celebrate!
I want to be sure you had the opportunity to get your tickets for the NHGOP Victory Dinner on December 7th. At the dinner, we will hear from special guest Governor-elect Chris Sununu. [Click here](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAONS6Aib8p9E2AIkD9i2eqyUS-2BnOz6PXnItmWNZjiIC_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MDUSMvbWAcllTIByWPWejVh23-2BETWZT6Gm-2FKMP6AKrz-2BoN-2Fd0bgJM4m5ZbFIuEoaQTk5BIeXvdD8ZanTg86ZA-2FHtTBpi29yLNzeApQtrDr08B1fHu1Vy1OopdmC2qIEX-2F6yPDjBlrlnbqyMyu4QR-2F-2FsJ0mbGcQjd3V7px63GDktXDayd5hzOa-2FinSvRVgxSrjaKgVNf9LHkno88d-2BYPXw52bUpAX0MRl7xxtAd3xA3EdYVfG0i1OcEdoyz3Jg3T2q7xByBRxfl-2Ffl56vWeNUjsA-3D-3D) or the invitation below to get your tickets. |

clean_body: | | | Friend, New Hampshire Republicans have a lot to celebrate! I want to be sure you had the opportunity to get your tickets for the NHGOP Victory Dinner on December 7th. At the dinner, we will hear from special guest Governor-elect Chris Sununu. or the invitation below to get your tickets. | | Additional speakers and program will be announced in the coming days. I look forward to seeing you there, | | Mike Swetz Finance Director New Hampshire Republican State Committee | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire · 10 Water Street · Concord · New Hampshire · 03301
